discovered_tools.name: 1Panel
discovered_tools.description: 🔥 1Panel is a modern, open-source VPS control panel — and only one with native AI agent support. Run Ollama models, deploy OpenClaw agents, and manage your entire server stack from one clean web interface.
discovered_tools.why_add: Unique positioning - VPS panel with native AI agent integration. Bridging server management and AI workflows.

discovered_tools.name: OpenViking
discovered_tools.description: OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents (such as openclaw). Unifies management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolution.
discovered_tools.why_add: 2026 paradigm - specialized context database for AI agents. Addresses critical agent infrastructure gap.

discovered_tools.name: gpt-researcher
discovered_tools.description: An autonomous agent that conducts deep research on any data using any LLM providers. Combines search engines, web scraping, and LLMs to perform iterative, comprehensive research on any topic.
discovered_tools.why_add: Production-ready research agent with strong community. Fills autonomous research tooling gap.

discovered_tools.name: vibe-kanban
discovered_tools.description: Get 10X more out of Claude Code, Codex or any coding agent. A productivity tool designed to enhance agent-based coding workflows with kanban-style task management.
discovered_tools.why_add: Emerging category - productivity tools for agent harnesses. High growth, active development.

discovered_tools.name: agents-towards-production
discovered_tools.description: End-to-end, code-first tutorials for building production-grade GenAI agents. From prototype to enterprise deployment. Covers real-world patterns, testing, and deployment strategies.
discovered_tools.why_add: Educational resource bridging dev to production. Addresses critical gap in agent deployment knowledge.

sources_scanned: GitHub Search (stars > 500, updated in last 30 days)
